research_question: What is the fragility of statistically significant outcomes reported in RCTs in spine surgery?

population.name: Population (Meta-Research)
include: randomized controlled trials (RCTs) in spine surgery
RCTs reporting at least one statistically significant binary outcome (p < 0.05)
exclude: studies without binary outcomes (continuous outcomes only)

intervention.name: Intervention
include: any surgical or non-surgical treatment for spine conditions

comparison.name: Comparison
include: any comparator arm in the RCT

outcome.name: Outcome
include: fragility index (FI) — minimum events to reverse significance

study_design_include: randomized controlled trials (RCTs) in spine surgery
